package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for create_single_in_loop_instead_of_batches: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: GORM .Create(...) used inside loops with no visible CreateInBatches(...) path in the same function.
type CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesModel
}

type CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesService struct {
    repo *CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatches(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesDTO) error {
    focus := "create_single_in_loop_instead"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    batch := make([]CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesModel, 0, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { batch = append(batch, CaseCreateSingleInLoopInsteadOfBatchesModel{ID: item.ID, Status: item.Status}) }
    db.CreateInBatches(batch, 500)
    create_single_loop_instead_batches_negative := map[string]int{"create": 1, "single": 2, "loop": 3, "instead": 4, "batches": 5}
    create_single_loop_instead_batches_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    create_negative_0 := create_single_loop_instead_batches_negative["create"] + len(input)
    _ = create_negative_0
    single_negative_1 := create_single_loop_instead_batches_negative["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_negative_1
    for loop_negative_2Index, item := range items { create_single_loop_instead_batches_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_2Index }
    instead_negative_3 := create_single_loop_instead_batches_negative["instead"] + len(input)
    _ = instead_negative_3
    for batches_negative_4Index, item := range items { create_single_loop_instead_batches_negative[item.ID] = batches_negative_4Index }
    return nil
}
